blind_seer.name: Vow of the Blind Seer
blind_seer.description: Sacrifice 3 FOV. Spell AoE radius increased by 2.

pacifist.name: Vow of the Pacifist
pacifist.description: Sacrifice all physical Attack. Enemies in FOV take passive entropy damage.

martyr.name: Vow of the Martyr
martyr.description: Maximum Health is locked. Killing enemies reduces Entropy.
